product_name: ANIME HEROES MEGA - Naruto - Sasuke Uchiha 12" Action Figure

bullets: Play with your favorite characters - each 12-inch figure comes with 5 points of articulation and endless fun. Durable, tough, and ready for action inside, or outside, these figures are great to play with and will last a long time in even the roughest conditions

Looks just like the show -  Anime Heroes Mega figurse have true to character deco and sculpting to make sure each figure come to life in your hands, and look just like your favorite characters in the anime!
For kids of all ages - these figures are just as much for the adult fans as they are for the kids and make a perfect addition to your Naruto collection
Collectible Package - anime inspired packaging that looks as good on your shelf as the figures do in your hands
content.description: Fans of one of the biggest anime's of all time, Naruto, can now bring home their favorite characters from the Anime Heroes 12-inch Naruto action figure line, by Bandai Namco Toys & Collectibles. Immerse yourself into the world of Naruto and recreate the biggest battles and missions with action figures that look exactly like their anime characters!
